title: Valentte Reed Diffuser & Natural Room Mist - Jasmine & Rosewood Scent | Essential Oil Aroma for Home, Gift Box | 100 ml, 30 ml
features: LONG-LASTING SCENT: Infused with natural essential oils, this reed diffuser spreads a warm, inviting scent that fills your home for weeks
RELAXING AROMA: A carefully blended soothing mix of eight pure essential oils helps ease stress, uplift your mood, creating a comforting and relaxing atmosphere
JASMINE & ROSEWOOD: The elegant floral blend of jasmine and warm rosewood promotes relaxation, lifts your mood, eases stress, and fills your home with a soothing, tranquil, and long-lasting fragrance
CUSTOMISABLE SCENT: Adjust the fragrance by flipping reeds for a stronger aroma or removing a few for a lighter touch, creating a cosy atmosphere with minimal effort and no flames
HANDMADE GIFT: Crafted in the UK with pure essential oils, this diffuser and natural room mist are beautifully packaged in a gift box for yourself or a loved one
description: Product Description Wax Melts ✓ Our wax melts smell incredible, look beautiful and they actually work! ✓ Choose your favourite fragrance or try a scent selection with one of our mixed sets. ✓ A beautiful treat for you, or the perfect gift for your loved one. Candles ✓ We understand how disappointing it can be to buy candles that smell fantastic in the shop, only to find that you can’t actually smell them when you burn them at home. ✓ Our candles are different. Infused with 100% essential oils for a natural authentic scent and a powerful fragrance throw. Reed Diffusers ✓ We believe everybody should be surrounded by natural essential oils with aromatherapy properties that improve your emotional health and wellbeing. ✓ Reed Diffusers are a great way to fill your space with beautiful fragrance and positive therapeutic benefits. Gift Sets ✓ We've combined our favourite Valentte products to make the perfect gifts for your loved ones. ✓ Hand-crafted and wrapped in a luxurious Gift Box to make your present extra special.
